title: Fullbright by Finnvian
description: Fullbright is a resource pack that increases the brightness of Minecraft. This is a useful tool to be able to see in darker areas to improve gaming experience.
body:
Fullbright lets you see in the dark by modifying the brightness of Minecraft. This is a useful tool which works in all Minecraft vanilla environments such as the Overworld, Nether and the End. Additionally, this Minecraft resource pack is compatible with other resource packs, so you can use the pack that you want while having Fullbright.

**Information**:
- You can set your **in-game brightness** to **100%** (Bright) to enhance the brightness effect.
- If you use **another resource pack** and it modifies "shaders", set the Fullbright resource pack to the **top** of the list to ensure it works.
